things.name: Golestan Palace
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Qajar royal palace complex with lavish mirrored halls and throne room

things.name: National Museum of Iran
things.description: Iran's most important museum with artefacts from prehistoric Persia through the Sassanid era

things.name: Milad Tower
things.description: World's sixth tallest tower at 435m with a revolving restaurant and observation deck

things.name: Grand Bazaar of Tehran
things.description: Vast UNESCO-listed bazaar stretching 10km with gold, carpets, spices and everything Iranian

things.name: Tabiat Bridge
things.description: Award-winning pedestrian bridge over the Chamran Highway, Tehran's favourite gathering place

things.name: Sa'dabad Palace Complex
things.description: 14 palaces in a cool mountain setting used by the Qajar and Pahlavi dynasties

things.name: Niavaran Palace Complex
things.description: Mohammad Reza Shah's final palace with extraordinary collections of art and royal memorabilia

things.name: Tehran Museum of Contemporary Art
things.description: One of the most important modern art collections outside Europe - Picasso, Warhol, Pollock

things.name: Darband Mountain Trail
things.description: Popular hiking trail into the Alborz Mountains with tea houses, mountain streams and skiing nearby

things.name: Carpet Museum of Iran
things.description: The world's finest collection of Persian carpets spanning five centuries
